    Lissajous Curves


    Lissajous Curves are generated by two simple harmonic oscilators in the parametric system: $$x = \sin(\omega_1 t + \phi); y = \sin(\omega_2 t).$$ Below you can input your own custom values of $\omega_1, \omega_2, \phi$ in order to generate Lissajous curves of your own.

    Value of $\omega_1$:
    Value of $\omega_2$:
    Value of $\phi$: $\pi$ radians.
    Speed:
